MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der appeared by telephone for Debra Dolch (Petitioner).

The Court noted that Ms. Rasch was not present. Mr. Der stated that he is not expecting anyone else to appear. The Court suggested bifurcating the petition to permit Ronald Tyler's Son to live in the residence free of rent until the occupancy issue of Mr. Montgomery is resolved. The Court also informed Mr. Der that the accounting has a number of issues as noted in the Probate Examiner's notes and that the issues need to be addressed in an amendment. The Court granted the issue of residence (subject to receipt and review of the order). Mr. Der is to provide a form of order. The Second Account and Report of Successor Trustee, etc. is continued to August 17, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of an amendment.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
